full_text:
Sima Yi (Shidu) 司馬乂 (士度)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Yi (司馬乂), styledShidu (士度). The fifth of the Princes associated with the Turmoil of the Eight Princes. Sima Yi was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Sima Yi lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
